About Me

I'm Vitumbiko Banda, a software developer and cybersecurity enthusiast passionate about building reliable and secure applications.

I specialise in mobile and web development, creating scalable and user-friendly systems that are also resilient to security threats.

Highly motivated with a strong sense of urgency — I respond positively to challenges and tight deadlines.
